lede: I write about _Perishable Knowledge_ — the idea that the best founders exploit time-bound information advantages. I'm a venture capitalist a lecturer at Stanford University, and I'm writing a book by the same name.
subscribe_note: New essay every week. Unsubscribe in one click.
subscribe_note_with_count: 12,400+ readers. New essay every Tuesday. Unsubscribe in one click.
book_section_blurb: Ten years of teaching, investing, and writing, distilled into a single framework for anyone building in the post-AI era. Expected early 2027.
